## Quality Dimension

- [ ] Attribution (missing or incorrect source citation)
- [ ] Link freshness (broken URL)
- [ ] Content accuracy (framework description is wrong or outdated)
- [ ] Terminology (inconsistent term usage across files)
- [ ] Scoring (scale mismatch between command/agent/knowledge)
- [ ] Coverage gap (use case not addressed)
- [ ] Cross-reference (agent/skill reference broken)
